translations.en: a quiet man, who almost seems to be a creature of the forest.
translations.zh: 一位沉靜之人，宛如森林之生靈。

translations.en: "I help my @friends when they need it."
"The rest of my time I prefer to spend exploring the @woods."
translations.zh: 「其餘時光，我寧願在@woods（森林）中漫遊。」

translations.en: "Though we have spent much time apart between your several visits to our realm, still I consider you one of my closest friends."
translations.zh: 「雖然汝數度造訪我等之境，相聚甚少，然我仍視汝為摯友。」

translations.en: "Spiritwood isn't as dense, and it has those strange @wisps everywhere."
translations.zh: 「靈魂林不夠幽深，且四處皆是怪異的@wisps（幽影）。」

translations.en: *"I love walking in the dark shadows of the trees, and studying the nature of the forest @creatures."
translations.zh: *「我愛走在林木深影之中，觀察森林@creatures（生靈）的習性。」

translations.en: "A home needs not @walls to make it so."
"When folk ask why I have no walls in my home, I ask where are the @trees in theirs!" He smiles.
translations.zh: 「人問我屋中何以無牆，我便反問——他們屋中何以無@trees（樹）！」他微微一笑。

translations.en: "In many ways they are the lifesblood of the realm. Without trees, we could not long endure."
translations.zh: 「樹乃此境之命脈。無樹，吾等難以久存。」

translations.en: "Those that dwell in the woods have lives of their own, more interesting to me than the ways of townfolk."
translations.zh: 「林中生靈各有其道，於我而言，比城裡人更有趣。」

translations.en: "There is much to be learned from the animals, if you will but listen."
translations.zh: 「若汝肯聆聽，便能從野獸身上學到不少。」

translations.en: Dupre says "Now Shamino's going on about talking to animals... The whole world's going batty!"
translations.zh: 杜普雷說「夏米諾又在說那跟動物對話的事了……這世界都瘋了！」

translations.en: "I know little of their nature. I believe there are some @mages who have investigated them, however."
translations.zh: 「我所知不多。但聽說有些@mages（法師）曾研究此物。」

translations.en: "Perhaps one of the members of the council could tell you more."
translations.zh: 「或者議會中有人能告訴汝更多。」

translations.note: keyword 短碼維持（玩家輸入可 prefix match）

translations.en: "I feel that Lord @British does not understand their true nature."
translations.zh: 「我覺得@British（不列顛王）並未真正了解魔像族的本性。」
translations.note: 內嵌譯名統一為『魔像族』

translations.en: "I know him better than you might think."
translations.zh: 「我對他的了解，比汝想的還深。」

translations.en: "I'll follow you wherever you might choose to lead - you know that."
"I feel you need my guidance through the wild parts of Britannia. I'd best stay with you."
translations.zh: 「我覺得汝在不列顛尼亞的荒野中仍需我引路。我還是隨汝同行為妙。」

riddles_additions.en: When folk ask why I have no walls in my home, I ask where are the trees in theirs!
riddles_additions.zh: 「人問我屋中何以無牆，我便反問——他們屋中何以無樹！」

translator_notes: Strict 重譯：(1) offset 99 全名縮為『夏米諾薩列』 (2) offset 134 業 (3) offset 1710 別 (4) offset 1714 榮幸。 (5) B-03 fix: keyword 維持『魔像』短碼、內嵌譯『魔像族』 (6) B-08: 鑽→研究 (7) B-09: 許→不少/或者。全 41 條 ≤ len。
